eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: El Paso, TX; at 08:01 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 10:01 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Emergency alert system testing ensures our ability to notify the public quickly during disasters using various notification methods.  These tests help us strengthen our coordination and response across agencies. This statewide drill directly benefits El Paso County by improving readiness, reliability, and public safety during real emergencies. 

Las pruebas del sistema de alertas de emergencia garantizan nuestra capacidad de notificar al publico rapidamente durante desastres mediante diversos metodos. Estas pruebas fortalecen la coordinacion entre agencias y mejoran la preparacion, confiabilidad y seguridad publica en el Condado de El Paso
